---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mitchell-mecham/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/MLMecham

---

I’m Mitchell, welcome to my blog,
Where curious finds I love to log.
I write on things both rare and new,
The novel sights that catch my view.
